scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @bridge/server & npm run dev -w @bridge/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bridge/shared && npm run build -w @bridge/server && npm run build -w @bridge/web && npm run build -w @bridge/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @bridge/shared && npm run test -w @bridge/server && npm run test -w @bridge/web && npm run test -w @bridge/desktop && npm run test -w @bridge/mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @bridge/shared && npm run lint -w @bridge/server && npm run lint -w @bridge/web && npm run lint -w @bridge/desktop && npm run lint -w @bridge/mobile
